title: Cross-cutting — Cisco ISE Certificate Lifecycle Attestation (NAC PKI)

compliance.assurance_rationale: A.8.24 — cryptographic lifecycle. Cross-cutting evidence applicable beyond ISO 27001.
SC-12 cryptographic key establishment — cert lifecycle attestation.
PCI 3.7.1 — cryptographic key management policy. Lifecycle attestation.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (36003, 36004, 36005, 35201) earliest=-1d
| stats count by certificate_subject, MessageCode
| eval evidence_status="cert_lifecycle_attestation"
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously attest cross-cutting certificate lifecycle health for ISE NAC PKI.
value: Multiple frameworks require crypto lifecycle controls. This UC produces shared evidence.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for the cross-cutting access-control evidence pack.

references.title: UC-17.1.31 — Cisco ISE Certificate Expiry and Trust-Chain Health

detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.31 operational.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.41.6: Cert Lifecycle Attestation]
cron_schedule = 0 7 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.41.6,family=encryption_key_mgmt
```
grandmaExplanation: We continuously attest cross-cutting certificate lifecycle health for ISE NAC PKI. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.
